articleTitle: Exploring the therapeutic synergy of drug-lifestyle interventions in fluorosis: a randomized trial on cardiovascular metabolic outcomes from the China fluorosis cohort (CFC).
takeaways: This study only provides background information about skeletal fluorosis and cardiovascular risks but does not present actual research findings or results
No specific interventions, dosages, durations, or quantitative outcomes are reported in the available abstract
The research identifies a gap in current treatment approaches which are limited to pain management and standard bone treatments
Skeletal fluorosis patients show increased risk of endothelial dysfunction, oxidative stress, and disrupted calcium-phosphate metabolism
Current clinical practice lacks targeted therapies that address both skeletal and cardiovascular complications simultaneously
